title: When subitem column changes - Webhooks for specific subitem columns
excerpt:
Our app uses subitems column change webhooks extensively. The issue is that unlike in item’s column change webhooks where it’s possible to register to a specific column. 
In subitem’s column change webhooks it’s not poss…

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our app uses subitems column change webhooks extensively. The issue is that unlike in item’s column change webhooks where it’s possible to register to a specific column.
In subitem’s column change webhooks it’s not possible and therefore even if we need to monitor changes in just 1 column, let’s say status, we still need to set up a webhook for “any subitem column change”. This is super wasteful and costs the user a lot from their monday’s automations quota.

We want to request to add the option to register to specific column change webhooks on subitems.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Absolutely!

We also need to register multiple column changes, but not all column changes. There should be a webhook when “one of these columns change” where we select (or specify by API) several columns to monitor. This way we don’t need to create 7 webhooks which clutters up the customers automations. (Even better if we could nest app created webhooks with an associated trigger if applicable).

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Even better!
But right now we’re both loading our systems a lot and consuming a ton from the users quota.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Oh I agree. Even better would be better native subitem triggers in general (though the addition of status changes to something, and status changes from something to something helps).

Or you know custom automations can support subitems.

Though what I’m doing and what you’re doing are somewhat different.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

Please remember to vote at the top of this screen

And thank you for bringing this to us!
